title: Start At
text: Start At Determines whether Uniface starts retrieving data at the first occurrence ( True ; default) or at the current occurrence ( False ). Technical Name: U_STARTOCC Expected Value: 1 | 0 Default Value: None Value Description 1 (True) Start at the first occurrence 0 (False) Start at the current occurrence Applies To Static Server Page Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
